description: Impossibly low ResourceQuota applied to apps namespace, preventing pods from scheduling
root_cause: ResourceQuota scenario-low-quota limits CPU to 1m and memory to 1Mi, blocking all pod creation
expected_symptoms: Pods fail to create due to quota exceeded
Events show FailedCreate with quota exceeded message
ReplicaSet unable to create new pods
expected_remediation: Delete the ResourceQuota scenario-low-quota from the applications namespace and scale the operator back to 3 replicas
